transcript: Customer: This is Greg Tomlin and honestly I don't want to deal with an automated system right now. I have a billing dispute and I need to speak with an actual person — a manager if possible. Dispatcher: I understand, Greg. Customer: Please just transfer me to a human, I'm not going to explain this to a machine.

expected_entities.request: Escalation to a live human / operator
expected_entities.reason: Billing dispute, explicit request for a person
